# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

No amendment-worthy correctness issues found. The diff only updates run-state metadata files: `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-5/journal.ndjson` (new entries at lines 76–79) and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-5/run.json` (lines 16–37). There are no implementation code changes in this patch, so no safety/robustness defects were introduced in code paths.

## Amendments

None.
